items.caption: A vintage stock certificate from "the standard oil company" with a focus on oil and gas. the certificate is ornate, featuring a green and white color scheme with intricate borders and a watermark-like design. it includes printed text detailing the company's name, the type of stock, the number of shares, and the par value. the certificate also includes a signature at the bottom, indicating its authenticity. the style of the image suggests it is a historical document, possibly from the early to mid-20th century.
